description.p: This magical shield is remarkably powerful, granting a +2 bonus to AC. It bears the craftsmanship of infernal artificers and seems to hum with contained power.

As a reaction, when you or an ally within 5 feet of you is targeted by a ranged attack or a damaging area effect, you can expand the shield to cover a wider area. Targets you choose within 5 feet of you gain half cover against ranged attacks, or +2 to their saving throws against the area effect until the start of your next turn.
The material of this shield is incredibly resistant to impacts, absorbing nearly all the force of blows. You are immune to being knocked prone or pushed by attacks.

As an action, you can activate the magnetic mechanism of this shield to slam its layers together, generating a shockwave in a 15-foot cone in front of you. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 21). On a failed save, a creature is thrown 25 feet backward and knocked prone. If it strikes an obstacle, it takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage. This shield has 3 charges and regains 1d4 - 1 charges when you finish a long rest.
